title: Verify existing implementation of toTitleCase utility
description: The toTitleCase utility function already exists in src/utils/to-title-case.ts with full test coverage in src/utils/to-title-case.test.ts. All 7 tests pass, covering: basic conversion, single word, empty string, already title cased strings, lowercase-after-first, multiple spaces, and single character words.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - single-function utility files in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts files
